LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER J.G. WENTWORTH ORIGINATIONS, LLC'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR APPROVAL FOR TRANSFER OF PAYMENT RIGHTS. THE UNOPPOSED PETITION FOR APPROVAL FOR TRANSFER OF PAYMENT RIGHTS PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA INSURANCE CODE SECTION 10134, ET SEQ., IS GRANTED. THE TRANSFER OF THE STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS IS FAIR AND REASONABLE AND IN THE BEST INTEREST OF THE PAYEE, TAKING INTO ACCOUNT THE WELFARE AND SUPPORT OF HIS OR HER DEPENDENTS. COUNSEL FOR THE MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: SUZANNE BOLANOS, CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/SRB)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 210003606)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights
Off Calendar Feb-24-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER J.G. WENTWORTH ORIGINATIONS, LLC'S Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights

The unopposed Petition for Approval for Transfer of Payment Rights pursuant to California Insurance Code Section 10134, et seq., is granted. The transfer of the structured settlement payment rights is fair and reasonable and in the best interest of the payee, taking into account the welfare and support of his or her dependents. Counsel for the moving party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling.

Judge: Suzanne Bolanos, Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/SRB)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights
Off Calendar Jan-27-2022 Continued To Feb-24-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Kimberly Pomerantz, Esq. (no information provided) for Petitioner.
No other appearances.

Hearing is held (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). Ms. Pomerantz requested 4 week continuance to re-price structure settlement. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER J.G. WENTWORTH ORIGINATIONS, LLC'S Hearing On Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights is continued to February 24, 2022.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
